title: Lesser & Pavey Thirsteez Travel Cup Be Happy for Hot Or Cold Drinks | Large Thermal Travel Mug with Lid & Handle for Office, Gym, Home Or Travel | Insulated Tumbler Coffee Cups for Daily Use
features: PREMIUM INSULATED DESIGN FOR DAILY USE: This insulated tumbler with lid maintains your beverage’s temperature for hours, ideal as a travel mug for coffee, tea, or chilled water on the go or at work.
STAINLESS STEEL TUMBLER WITH HANDLE: Made from durable stainless steel, this tumbler with handle ensures a comfortable grip and long-lasting performance for both hot and cold drinks.

VERSATILE THERMAL TRAVEL MUG FOR EVERYDAY LIFE: Whether you're heading to the gym, office, or on a road trip, this large travel mug is perfect as a coffee flask travel mug or refreshing water tumbler.
SPILL-RESISTANT LID FOR ON-THE-GO USE: The secure-fit lid minimizes spills while drinking or traveling, making it a dependable travel mug with lid for daily commutes, work desks, or long drives.
MODERN AND FUNCTIONAL FOR EVERY SETTING: A simple modern tumbler with clean aesthetics, ideal for kitchen, desk, or travel use—great as a coffee cup, thermal cup, or giftable travel cup.
